entry.title: ProtobufConfiguration
entry.content:
1.дҫқиө–

sudo apt-get install autoconf automake libtool
curl make g++ unzip

git clone
https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf.git
cd protobuf
git submodule update --init --recursive
./autogen.sh

2.to build and install the C++ Protocol Buffer runtime and the Protocol Buffer compiler (protoc) execute the following:

```Shell
./configure --prefix=жҢҮе®ҡи·Ҝеҫ„
make
make check
sudo make install
sudo ldconfig # refresh shared library cache.

еҲ°жӯӨжӯҘиҝҳжІЎжңүе®үиЈ…е®ҢжҜ•пјҢ
####### add protobuf lib path ######

#пјҲеҠЁжҖҒеә“жҗңзҙўи·Ҝеҫ„пјүзЁӢеәҸеҠ иҪҪиҝҗиЎҢжңҹй—ҙжҹҘжүҫеҠЁжҖҒй“ҫжҺҘеә“ж—¶жҢҮе®ҡйҷӨдәҶзі»з»ҹй»ҳи®Өи·Ҝеҫ„д№ӢеӨ–зҡ„е…¶д»–и·Ҝеҫ„
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$LD_LIBRARY_PATH:/usr/local/protobuf/lib/ 

#пјҲйқҷжҖҒеә“жҗңзҙўи·Ҝеҫ„пјүзЁӢеәҸзј–иҜ‘жңҹй—ҙжҹҘжүҫеҠЁжҖҒй“ҫжҺҘеә“ж—¶жҢҮе®ҡжҹҘжүҫе…ұдә«еә“зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„
export LIBRARY_PATH=$LIBRARY_PATH:/usr/local/protobuf/lib/

#жү§иЎҢзЁӢеәҸжҗңзҙўи·Ҝеҫ„
export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/protobuf/bin/ 

#cзЁӢеәҸеӨҙж–Үд»¶жҗңзҙўи·Ҝеҫ„
export C_INCLUDE_PATH=$C_INCLUDE_PATH:/usr/local/protobuf/include/ 

#C++зЁӢеәҸеӨҙж–Үд»¶жҗңзҙўи·Ҝеҫ„
export CPLUS_INCLUDE_PATH=$CPLUS_INCLUDE _PATH:/usr/local/protobuf/include/ 

#pkgвҖ” config и·Ҝеҫ„
export PKG_CONFIG PATH=/usr/local/protobuf/lib/pkgconfig/
###############################################
```

3.зј–иҜ‘Python

```Shell
cd python
python setup.py build 
python setup.py test
python setup.py install
```

 йӘҢиҜҒ

```Shell
python
import google.protobuf
```

еҚёиҪҪ

```Shell
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/protoc //жү§вҫҸвҪӮд»¶
sudo rm -rf /usr/local/include/google //еӨҙвҪӮд»¶
sudo rm -rf /usr/local/lib/libproto* //еә“вҪӮд»¶
```
